name: qc-questions
description: QC IRT-aligned assessment questions for correctness and difficulty alignment from a .xlsx bulk-upload sheet or a single standalone MCQ. Dual-blind discipline holds back BOTH correctOption AND marked difficulty as audit targets — Modified Angoff + discrimination/guessing proxies + blind-solve, blind-difficulty-rate parallel subagents; emits a colour-coded Corrected sheet with exact edits applied.
